description:
The python3-abrt-addon package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove python3-abrt-addon
rationale:
<tt>python3-abrt-addon</tt> contains python hook and python analyzer
plugin for handling uncaught exceptions in python programs.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the python3-abrt-addon package is installed: 
$ rpm -q python3-abrt-addon
title: Uninstall python3-abrt-addon Package
